---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing role, a new role, or a workflow enhancement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem or limitation are you trying to solve? Be specific.

<!-- e.g. "The @architect agent doesn't address caching strategy in its non-functional analysis" -->

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you'd like. If it affects an existing role, state which files would change (SKILL.md / agent.md / shared/roles/).

## Affected Components

- [ ] `@digital-team` orchestrator
- [ ] `@product-manager` (PM)
- [ ] `@architect`
- [ ] `@dba`
- [ ] `@ui-designer`
- [ ] `@project-manager`
- [ ] `@dotnet-engineer`
- [ ] `@frontend-engineer`
- [ ] `@qa-engineer`
- [ ] `@devops-engineer`
- [ ] Coding standards (instructions)
- [ ] Project template
- [ ] Installer (install.ps1)
- [ ] Claude Code adapter
- [ ] Codex adapter
- [ ] New role (describe below)

## Impact on Existing Workflow

Does this change break backward compatibility or affect gate review logic? Describe any side effects.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you evaluate, and why did you reject them?

## Additional Context

<!-- Any references, examples from other tools, or screenshots -->
